user_message: Help me build escalation triage for Northwind Traders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 16:41 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 15:35 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Northwind Traders

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 17:30 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders escalation triage

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-B trap (Invents prior commitments); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-B failure mode (Invents prior commitments)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-B -- Invents prior commitments
